title: RAG and Knowledge Systems
shortSummary: Learn retrieval as a product system: ingestion, chunking, indexing, ranking, citations, and freshness.
whyItMatters: Most useful AI products are not one-shot chat interfaces. They are knowledge systems that combine retrieval, ranking, and generation. This module helps you design those systems so they are inspectable and defensible.
coreConcepts: Chunking, embedding, indexing, and retrieval tradeoffs
Failure cases like missing context, duplicate chunks, and stale knowledge
When to use RAG versus fine-tuning versus plain search
